The '''Mission to Nar Shaddaa''' was an opportunity for [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], who had been working undercover gathering intelligence for the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]], to appear as if he was no longer a part of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. By doing this, Vos would be able to infiltrate deeper into the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist's]] inner circle.

Following reports that linked Vos to the [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Clone Wars)|events]] that took place on [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]], many Jedi started to think he might have really been a traitor. However, the Jedi Council kept their faith in him and allowed him to "defect" from the Order. They sent an unknowing [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]] to go after Vos on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

On the Smugglers' Moon, Kolar encountered Vos and the two dueled. Kolar, believing that he was doing his duty to punish the traitor, nearly killed him, but Vos escaped, just as planned. The Jedi Council now had their operative deeper in the enemy's ranks.
